steps.title: Define the group counts
steps.content:
Let $a$ be the number of adults and $c$ be the number of children. The group has $24$ people, so
+$$a+c=24$$
+and the revenue equation is
+$$70a+50c=1{,}400$$

steps.title: Substitute for adults
steps.content:
From $a+c=24$, we have $a=24-c$. Substitute into the revenue equation:
+$$70(24-c)+50c=1{,}400$$
